title: Update rootless_tutorial.md
body: Adds clarifications in persistently setting unprivileged ping permissions. Any files in `/etc/sysctl.d/` must end in `.conf` to be read by systemd, and $MAX_UID is not set automatically, thus benefits from some explanation of what to set it to.

comments.body:
You also need to sign your PR.

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force
I think I fixed it. Sorry if I made a mess of the commits, I'm really new to git and still learning best practices.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
